positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: a metallic gray SUV seen from a high overhead angle in a parking space beside asphalt, white parking lines, a tiled curb, a vertical post shadow, roof rails, dark windows, and a panoramic glass roof reflecting clouds. Preserve the original aspect ratio, vehicle model, body shape, paint color, trim, wheels, windows, roof glass, surrounding pavement, curb, and composition. The first frame shows the SUV already aligned in the parking space, not suddenly accelerating. During the clip, the SUV slowly creeps forward only a few inches in the direction it is facing; the visible wheels rotate slightly and coherently. By the final frames, the vehicle comes to a complete gentle stop while staying fully visible in the same parking-lot composition. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable overhead drift with gentle parallax, minimal and not distracting. Keep the SUV clearly visible. Add subtle visible motion only where appropriate: cloud reflections glide softly across the panoramic roof and windows, highlights shift gently on the bodywork, and the strong pavement shadows remain stable with slight natural light variation. Photorealistic, natural daylight, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable vehicle shape, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: The SUV must not speed away, leave the frame, reverse, turn sharply, open doors, change model, change color, transform into another vehicle, lift off the ground, slide sideways, drift, crash, or start a dramatic driving scene, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent vehicle shape, warped wheels, broken roof rails, distorted windows, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden pose change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, text artifacts, license plate distortion, logo distortion.
